name: Extended Warranty
description: Adds one extra year of coverage for defects, failures, and replacement support.
benefits: Coverage for mechanical and electrical failures

name: Accidental Damage Protection
description: Helps cover accidental drops, cracks, spills, and other day-to-day mishaps.
benefits: Covers accidental impact and liquid damage

name: Priority Support
description: Get faster help, setup guidance, and troubleshooting support when you need it.
